Text: Based on recent listings for similar Lincoln Penny Small Date coins on eBay, the average selling price is approximately $3,200.00 to $4,500.00, suggesting an optimal price of around $3,850.00 for this coin.

After researching similar 1972 error coins on eBay, the average selling price appears to range between $200.00 and $300.00. Considering this, the optimal price for the 1972 Quarter Error Coin could be set at approximately $250.00 to remain competitive in the market.

Notes: During this mid year, they did not make purely cover coins. They’re supposed to be mixed with zinc and other metals, but this one is pure copper.
Text: Based on recent listings for similar Lincoln Pennies from 1989 on eBay, the average selling price ranges from $9,500.00 to $12,500.00. Therefore, an optimal price for the Lincoln Penny 1989 d, considering its super rare status and pure copper composition, would be approximately $11,000.00.

Based on recent listings for similar coins on eBay, the optimal price for the 25C 1972 Denver variety appears to be around $25.00. This average is derived from various sales ranging from $20.00 to $30.00.
